title: Build your first Android app in AI Studio in 5 minutes
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build a native Android photography app using Google AI Studio with Gemini 3.5 Flash for initial prompting and app prototyping. The video covers sideloading to device and rapid debugging workflows.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building a native Android photography app in Google AI Studio, using Gemini 3.5 Flash for the initial prompting and app prototyping. It covers the full short loop: generating the app from a prompt, sideloading the build to a device, and iterating through rapid debugging. The takeaway is a workflow for prompt-driven prototyping that moves from prompt to running app on hardware quickly.
